name: Low-Fat Scrapple
recipeIngredient: 12 oz. (375g) light bulk breakfast sausage (turkey or turkey/pork combo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a two-quart (two-litre) microwavable dish.
2. Cook on high power for about 3 minutes, or until partly done. Drain out liquid.
3. Use a potato masher to break up the sausage further, or process it in a food processor and chop it slightly.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: thyme, salt, cornmeal, and water.
5. Cook at full power for ten to twelve minutes, stirring twice during that time until thickened.
6. Remove from oven and let sit for about 5 minutes. Spray a bread loaf pan with cooking spray.
7. Scrape in the scrapple mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Allow to cool thoroughly before covering and placing in refrigerator overnight.
9. In the morning, turn out the cooled scrapple onto a plate and slice it no thinner than 1/2 to 3/4".
10. Serve with maple syrup or top slices with poached egg.
